message:
Harden admin API security and fix PromptCard timer leak

- appeals route: Remove raw token bytes from reviewer identifier, use role only
- tag-mappings route: Add 200-char field length validation for alias/canonical, simplify error catch
- share/mine route: Use request.nextUrl.origin instead of hardcoded domain for share URLs
- PromptCard.tsx: Add copyTimerRef to track and clean up setTimeout on unmount, preventing timer leaks
- useLocalStorage.ts: Null out debounce ref after clearTimeout in cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
